name: devloop
description: Dev-loop workflow: git/PR (GitHub + GitLab) + workspace-aware state injection + lint/test gates + execution-level hard intercepts for Claude Code and Codex.

interface.longDescription: Bundles developer workflow skills (git-ops / gcam / gcamp / gcampr / run-test / fix-lint) plus lifecycle hooks: hard intercepts on protected branches, git add -A, pip install in uv projects, requirements.txt edits, stale lint gate; refreshes .devloop state from supported Codex events and injects branch / workspace / validation context.
